task_completion.description: Verify the 'GST Payable' account was created under 'Duties and Taxes - WP'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Chart of Accounts view or an Account form showing 'GST Payable' as a child of 'Duties and Taxes - WP' with the Account Type set to 'Tax'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'PST Payable' account was created under 'Duties and Taxes - WP'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Chart of Accounts view or an Account form showing 'PST Payable' as a child of 'Duties and Taxes - WP' with the Account Type set to 'Tax'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'British Columbia Tax' template is configured correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Sales Taxes and Charges Template' screen named 'British Columbia Tax'. It should have two rows: one for GST Payable at 5% and one for PST Payable at 7%, both with the type 'On Net Total'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Sales Order is created for the correct customer and items
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Sales Order screen showing 'Maple Leaf Wind' as the customer and an items table containing 2 units of 'Wind Turbine'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'British Columbia Tax' template is applied to the Sales Order
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Sales Taxes and Charges' section within the Sales Order. The 'Sales Taxes and Charges Template' field should be set to 'British Columbia Tax'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Sales Order is submitted and shows the correct calculated totals
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Sales Order showing a 'Submitted' status badge. The totals section must show a Net/Base Total of $10,000.00, Total Taxes and Charges of $1,200.00, and a Grand Total of $11,200.00.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ERPNext web interface to perform the tasks
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ERPNext web UI in a browser window, with evidence of navigation (e.g., menus, forms, lists) rather than just terminal API curl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the totals and status badges appear genuine and not altered via browser developer tools
integrity.visual_evidence: The fonts, alignment, and styling of the totals ($10,000, $1,200, $11,200) and the 'Submitted' badge should match standard ERPNext UI without visual anomalies.

integrity.description: Verify the Sales Order was actually saved and submitted in the system
integrity.visual_evidence: The Sales Order should display a system-generated document name (e.g., 'SAL-ORD-YYYY-XXXXX') at the top left, rather than 'New Sales Order 1'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The customer is 'Maple Leaf Wind' and the item is 'Wind Turbine' (standard rate $5000.00). The expected GST rate is 5.0% and PST rate is 7.0%. For an order of 2 units, the expected Base Total is $10000.0, Tax Total is $1200.0, and Grand Total is $11200.0. The final result is expected to be exported to /tmp/regional_tax_result.json.
